baseUrl.description: Hermes gateway base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:5800.

defaultPath.description: Default webhook path used when SendWebhook.path is empty.

allowedPaths.description: Exact Hermes paths this instance may call.

skipTlsVerify.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for lab devices only.

cliMode.description: How CLI-backed Hermes methods run. Use disabled for HTTP-only instances.

sshTarget.description: SSH target for cliMode=ssh, for example root@xy-internal-devbox-01.example.

allowedTargets.description: Optional exact allowlist for SendMessage targets. Empty means no target restriction.

messageSignature.description: Signature appended to DingTalk messages when missing.
